bitcoin_avalanche.exchanger: Buycoin This exchanger does not fix the exchange rate in the order. This exchanger may require verification of the client's documents or halt the payment to check other data. This exchanger requires registration before creating an order. The final exchange rate includes the following commissions: – 9 353.271716 – basic exchange rate; – 0.0235 AVAX – commission taken from the target currency.
